item.name: Baby Gremlin
item.description:
Feeding after midnight may result in injury. Yours.

Use item to acquire the baby gremlin minion.
item.tooltip:
Thin skin and big
mouths make for an
uneasy combination.
   - Hunter-scholar
item.specialactiondescription:
Reduces ATK of all enemies within range by 50%.
Duration: 15s
